query:
-- Separate real users from seed/test data
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN name LIKE 'Guest-%' AND name REGEXP '^Guest-[0-9]{5,}$' THEN 'seed_guest'
    WHEN name IN ('Cameron Jackson','Drew Thomas','Blake Anderson','Riley Davis','Blake Lee','Jordan Brown','Casey Jones','Quinn Moore','Drew Perez','Jordan White','Casey Harris','Morgan Miller','Riley Thompson','Cameron Taylor','Quinn Rodriguez','Taylor Garcia','Morgan Martin','Taylor Wilson','Morgan Davis') THEN 'seed_named'
    ELSE 'real_user'
  END AS user_type,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM users
GROUP BY user_type;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute 
-- Separate real users from seed/test data
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN name LIKE 'Guest-%' AND name REGEXP '^Guest-[0-9]{5,}$' THEN 'seed_guest'
    WHEN name IN ('Cameron Jackson','Drew Thomas','Blake Anderson','Riley Davis','Blake Lee','Jordan Brown','Casey Jones','Quinn Moore','Drew Perez','Jordan White','Casey Harris','Morgan Miller','Riley Thompson','Cameron Taylor','Quinn Rodriguez','Taylor Garcia','Morgan Martin','Taylor Wilson','Morgan Davis') THEN 'seed_named'
    ELSE 'real_user'
  END AS user_type,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM users
GROUP BY user_type;
